name: Project Library
description: Browse, filter, and manage video projects and starter templates. Entry point for opening existing work and kicking off new productions from curated blueprints.

page_briefs.projects: Project library with dual view mode. Default view is a responsive card grid of project thumbnails (16:9 poster), project title, last-modified relative time, scene count pill, and status badge (draft/rendering/published). A toggle switches to a data-table view with sortable columns: name, scenes, duration, last edited, owner, and status. Top bar includes search input, status filter chips, and prominent 'New Project' button.
page_briefs.templates: Template gallery with a prominent search and filter bar at top containing genre chips (cinematic, explainer, trailer, social), style filters, and duration ranges. Below, a dense card grid shows template cards with preview thumbnail, template name, short description, use-count badge, and a 'Use Template' action button that hover-reveals on each card.

shells.sidebar-main: Sidebar navigation with main content area
